MEDKIT.Title: Coven's Automation Toolkit Configuration: {name}
MEDKIT.IdentifierTooltip: Item & Activity identifiers must be modified on the respective document sheet.
MEDKIT.NoSourcesTooltip: There are no available sources of automation for this document.

DisplayDebugLogs.Name: Display Debug Logs
DisplayDebugLogs.Hint: When enabled, the console will show debug logs.

HideNames.Name: Hide Token Names
HideNames.Hint: Whene enabled, various dialogs will not show enemy token names.

DiceSoNice.Name: Dice So Nice Compatibility
DiceSoNice.Hint: When enabled, Dice So Nice damage roll animations will be delayed until after all damage roll macros are complete.

EffectDescriptions.Name: Automatic Effect Descriptions
EffectDescriptions.Hint: When enabled, effects without descriptions will automatically be filled in from the origin item.

EffectDescriptionsNPC.Name: Hide NPC Effect Descriptions
EffectDescriptionsNPC.Hint: When enabled, the Automatic Effect Description setting will not apply for NPC created effects.

CV.Name: {condition} Condition Vulnerability
CV.Description: Condition Vulnerability to {condition}, roll at disadvantage to save. 1/true for all saves, or a comma-separated list of abilities (e.g. str,dex).

CR.Name: {condition} Condition Resistance
CR.Description: Condition Resistance to {condition}, roll at advantage to save. 1/true for all saves, or a comma-separated list of abilities (e.g. str,dex).
